title: EVAs filled with LCL
wikitext:
[]: EVA's filled with LCL?             Quote Post by DaaveeZ » Fri Mar 25, 2011 9:29 am a

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Mar 25, 2011 10:06 am Evas are filled with blood and molten awesome .

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Mar 25, 2011 10:08 am I think the transparency is either from lolcameras or quantum magic.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Fri Mar 25, 2011 10:46 am To be honest, I always saw the transparency as something along the lines of "it would be annoying for both the animators and the viewers to have the inside of the Eva tinted every time so we're just not going to do it and hope people don't notice". Assuming this is actually the case, I don't mind personally.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Mar 25, 2011 3:26 pm Interior of entry plug is covered in screens. Outside of Eva is covered in tiny cameras. Put the two together... That's the answer to some thing, though the original question is so weird -- I thought this thread was going to be about this and this -- I'm not sure if I'm doing it right.

[]:             Quote Post by rhfxz1s » Fri Mar 25, 2011 10:46 am To be honest, I always saw the transparency as something along the lines of "it would be annoying for both the animators and the viewers to have the inside of the Eva tinted every time so we're just not going to do it and hope people don't notice". Assuming this is actually the case, I don't mind personally.

That's the answer to some thing, though the original question is so weird -- I thought this thread was going to be about this and this -- I'm not sure if I'm doing it right.
